incidents.incident_title: ANOMALY: Operational delay for Train 12301 near Kanpur Central
incidents.situation_summary: Train 12301 (Howrah Rajdhani Express) is delayed by 45 minutes near Kanpur Central due to line congestion and traffic slot scheduling constraints.
incidents.reroute_plan: Dijkstra Detour via secondary corridor line to bypass slot congestion at Kanpur Central
incidents.maintenance_task: Perform routine check on line switches and signaling points at Kanpur Central junction yards.
incidents.operations_task: Coordinate slot re-allocation with control room. Permit express overtake if possible.
incidents.station_manager_task: Announce delay of 45 minutes for Train 12301 Howrah Rajdhani Express arriving on platform.
incidents.passenger_sms: [RailMind Alert] Train 12301 is running late by 45 minutes near Kanpur Central.

incidents.incident_title: CRITICAL: Signal Grid Failure near Varanasi affecting Train 12259
incidents.situation_summary: Train 12259 (Sealdah Duronto Express) is halted at Varanasi due to a track signaling relay interlock failure. Interlocking points are jammed in default closed state.
incidents.reroute_plan: Dijkstra Detour via Varanasi Outer Loop -> East Bypass -> Join mainline (bypass Varanasi yards)
incidents.maintenance_task: Deploy signal maintenance technicians to Varanasi junction signal tower. Manually override relay points and inspect electronic interlock card (EIL-4).
incidents.operations_task: Halt consecutive services. Recalculate route for 12259 via bypass detour rail corridor to avoid Varanasi platform lines.
incidents.station_manager_task: Broadcast on PA system: Train 12259 Sealdah Duronto Express is delayed at Varanasi due to technical signal faults. Platform boards updated.
incidents.passenger_sms: [RailMind Alert] Train 12259 delayed due to signal failure near Varanasi. Alternate routing in progress.
